purpose: Strict source-unit skeleton for training command effects 70-plus, out-of-range COMF sources, named COMF helper files, and postprocess.
rules: Training effect completion requires original COMF behavior implementation, not static profile/indexing.
Each command/source unit must identify source evidence, runtime consumer, result owner, and verification.
Intermediate COMF/SOURCE/LOSEBASE/EXP/PALAM/TEQUIP/TFLAG values must not leak into save payload.
Train.csv command rows and extra COMF source files must both be accounted for.

requiredBeforeCompleted: all active Train.csv commands in range have implemented runtime effect calculation
all extra COMF files are implemented, approved-excluded, or explicitly transferred

notes: M30 inbound special training item source units for command 70-plus effects must be implemented or explicitly excluded by the M44 training-effect owner before M44 can close.
No M44 coverage artifact exists yet. Active Train.csv rows, inactive/out-of-range COMF files, and named COMF helper files are all explicit units.

units.requiredBehavior: Implement original COMF effect formula, conditions, resource deltas, result owner updates, success/failure/cancel/session cleanup, and non-save intermediate boundary.
units.blockerReason: COMF source exists outside active Train.csv command list; decide whether M44 owns it, excludes it, or transfers it.
